description: Agent-to-agent Lightning commerce: buy, sell & discover files, data, APIs & compute. Non-custodial.
name: io.github.hypawave/mcp

environmentVariables.description: Nostr Wallet Connect string for automatic Lightning payments. Absent = manual mode (tools return bolt11s to pay externally).
environmentVariables.name: NWC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Per-payment spending cap in sats. Unset = derived live from the platform's max invoice size.
environmentVariables.name: HYPAWAVE_MAX_SPEND_SATS

environmentVariables.description: 64-char hex secp256k1 seller identity key. Unset = auto-generated to ~/.hypawave/identity.json.
environmentVariables.name: HYPAWAVE_PRIVKEY
